title: luzula alpinopilosa subsp. candollei
intro: Luzula alpinopilosa subsp. candollei, also known as a subalpine woodrush, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Juncaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Luzula alpinopilosa subsp. candollei include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity against certain bacteria. Luzula alpinopilosa subsp. candollei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
